title: Engineered Realms
description: This is a Create Modpack with maximum satisfaction.
body:
Engineered Realms is a comprehensive mod pack designed for players who seek both creativity and functionality in their Minecraft experience. Packed with a wide array of mods, it aims to enhance every aspect of the game, from building intricate machines to exploring new dimensions. Now also with a Youtube Creator edition! _**DISCLAIMER:** When using this modpack for a video, link it in the description or give credits._
[Our website! It's Official!](https://engineeredrealms.netlify.app/)
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c32212d87ed5b18ea6b062d15f58da6bd087e602.jpeg)

Key Features:

- Enhanced Crafting and Building: With mods like Create Fabric, Create Unlimited, and Create: Structures, unleash your engineering prowess to build complex contraptions, sophisticated structures, and more.

- Advanced Tools and Equipment: Equip yourself with Create: Armor Trims, Create Jetpack, and Create: Unbreakable Tools to take on any challenge.

- Improved Performance: Experience smoother gameplay with performance-enhancing mods like Sodium, Iris Shaders, and Dynamic FPS.

- Quality of Life Enhancements: Enjoy mods like Better Beds, Better Advancements, and Tom's Simple Storage Mod for a more streamlined and enjoyable gaming experience.

- Exploration and Adventure: Discover new biomes and structures with BetterNether, BetterEnd, and Additional Structures.

- Customization and Utility: Tailor your gameplay with mods like Cloth Config API, Mod Menu, and Trinkets.

- Unique Additions: Stand out with unique mods such as LavaWalker, Strider's Grace, and Lightspeed Boat.

- Backups and Stability: Keep your world safe and sound with Fast Backups and enjoy a stable experience with Fabric API, Architectury API, and Moonlight Lib.

Whether you're a seasoned engineer or a curious adventurer, Engineered Realms offers a rich, immersive experience that takes Minecraft to the next level. Dive in and explore the endless possibilities!
